title: Canonical workload task metadata
description: One per task directory. Declares the invariants the runner asserts.

version.description: Schema version. Bumps require a new task_meta.vN.json file.

priority.description: True if this task is in the backend-milestone priority subset

expected_starting_returncode.description: Return code expected when running the test_command against the unmodified fixture. The runner asserts this in --dry-run and fails the task if it diverges.

language.description: Primary language. Drives default test_command and may steer the runner away from a tool the host doesn't have (e.g., skip TypeScript tasks when Node is absent).

test_command.description: Command (argv list) the runner invokes to evaluate fixture state. Defaults to ['python', '-m', 'pytest', '--tb=short', '-q'] when omitted.

pane_visibility.description: Phase C close — §3 UX-target hint. Suggested pane-visibility map for a measurement run; the driver writes the actual record to `.atelier/sessions/<sid>/pane_visibility.json`. Booleans default to true (visible) when omitted.

find_probe.description: Phase C close — §5 UX-target hint. Suggested driver sequence + target median latency for the `atelier find` probe; the driver appends actual probes to `.atelier/sessions/<sid>/find_probes.json`.
